Notice Of Motion, Motion For Reconsideration (Of 01/06/05 Order/Decision); Memo Of P&A; Declaration
Off Calendar Jan-18-2005 Off Calendar

Motion To Set Aside Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-06-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Defendant's Motion to Vacate Judgment Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff: Community Housing Partnership.
Defendant: Andre Rucker, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the Defendant's Motion and Plaintiff's Opposition, the Court Grants Defendant's Motion to Vacate Judgment.
New trial date is granted for Jan. 24, 2005 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 206.
No further Settlement Conference shall be held.
Parties agreed in open court to waive service of Notice of the new trial date.
Defendant is out of possession until the new trial date.
Order signed by Comm. Kaplan.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-06-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-06-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing/Court Trial this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff: Community Housing Partnership, a California nonprofit corporation.
No appearance by the Defendant: Andre L. Rucker.
Plaintiff's witness: Harold Dees was sworn and direct examined.
Exh. 1 - Three day notice---------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Andre L. Rucker as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 1000 Market St., #200, San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $119.98
No Attorney's Fees.
Costs is waived.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2004 Off Calendar

DEFENDANT ANDER L RUCKER IN PRO PER
